description: Computes area of a polygon or parallelogram defined by 3 or more points in 3D space.

arguments.name: points
arguments.description: Three or more points defining the polygon

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
A = point3d(G, 0, 0, 0)
B = point3d(G, 3, 0, 0)
C = point3d(G, 0, 4, 0)
area = area3d(G, A, B, C)
area = area3d(G, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0), point3d(G, 3, 0, 0), point3d(G, 3, 4, 0), point3d(G, 0, 4, 0))
